column1: Jacob Wilson headlines today's Beat The Streak picks, leading off for the Yankees with a steady bat and a prime platoon advantage against Ryan Weathers—his 71.8% hit probability is as reliable as it gets. Bo Bichette sits right behind, locked into the two-hole for the Mets with a similarly strong profile and a favorable matchup versus Eduardo Rodriguez. Maikel Garcia and Xavier Edwards also bring top-of-order roles and advantageous splits, making them solid fallback options for streak chasers. This slate is stacked with hitters in great spots—ride the hot hands at the top.
